name: Gwynedd (United Kingdom)
description: A field quartered yellow and red, bearing four lions counter-changed (the arms of Llywelyn ap Gruffudd).
history: Based on the historic arms of Llywelyn ap Gruffudd, the last sovereign Prince of Wales (d. 1282), and the medieval Kingdom of Gwynedd; recognised as the flag of Gwynedd.

features.symbolism: the arms of Llywelyn ap Gruffudd, the last sovereign Prince of Wales
